creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: That's the right one.  In bug 215345 somebody else also has a problem with the most recent Nvidia driver on FreeBSD 11 when trying to use linux-flashplayer.  It only seems to happen with multithreaded programs.  Could you install graphics/linux-c6-glx-utils and then run /compat/linux/usr/bin/glxgears to see if that works?  What is the output of /compat/linux/usr/bin/glxinfo?
